怂包性格，口头禅是“怎么又是我”，只想安静打工还债养妹。
谁知乌鸦嘴开光，随口一句话竟让霸总对手公司破产。
冰山女总裁龙傲雪将他当成“人形锦鲤”高薪绑走当顾问。
紧接着暴力拳王、科学怪人、修仙老祖接连登场，个个非说他是天选之子。
一个普通男人，被四个奇女子当成救命稻草，鸡飞狗跳中笑出腹肌。
当他终于成立公司翻身做主，才发现——最麻烦的还是她们！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3cf174763916121d1880817950d409e8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"用铁链放风筝","author_id":"","book_id":"7588611676665039897","book_name":"我的后宫不可能这么沙雕","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588611715642688025","read_count":"24","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"607276"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"200","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3cf174763916121d1880817950d409e8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165134&x-signature=C8s2s7chxbD4Coq3DsxHeYlPzys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4013643663423327","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320123214C9F0D05D50E5CBE559B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1788,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":97},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1767804518,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7588611676665039897","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_d
